headline: Shares of base metal-related companies are trading lower as investors rotate out of the industrial commodity amid ongoing conflict in the Middle East.
summary: Shares of base metal-related companies are trading lower as investors rotate out of the industrial commodity amid ongoing conflict in the Middle East.

raw.headline: Shares of base metal-related companies are trading lower as investors rotate out of the industrial commodity amid ongoing conflict in the Middle East.

headline: Novartis, Nucor partner US Forged Rings and others expand domestic investments
summary: Akston is ramping up production at its pet therapy facility in Louisiana and a switchboards maker plans to invest $79 million in a former Joann Fabrics facility in Alabama.

raw.headline: Novartis, Nucor partner US Forged Rings and others expand domestic investments
